name: Ivan Dreyar
description: __Name:__ Ivan Dreyar      __Eye & Hair color:__ Black   __Affiliations:__ Raven Tail Guild, Fairy Tail Guild (previously)   __Occupation:__ Mage   __Title:__ Guild Master of Raven Tail guild   __Relatives:__ Makarov (father), Laxus Dreyar (son)    Ivan Dreyar is the father of Laxus Dreyar and the son of Makarov and master/founder of the Raven Tail Guild.
